potted-plant/sprout ~ nē 'sprout'; SA modal confirms nē (Phase-73)
circle/sun ~ vel 'bright/victory'
cross ~ naṭu 'middle/centre'
leaf ~ ilaï
vessel/jar ~ kalam 'vessel'
U-cup ~ kuṭam 'pot/cup'
twig/branch ~ maram 'tree'
ladder/grid ~ vaṭam 'grid/net'
forked sign ~ piḷai 'branch/fork'
boat shape ~ tōṇi 'boat'
starburst ~ aṇi 'ornament/adorn'; name-slot evidence (Phase-103)
folded-arm ~ taṇṭu 'rod/staff'; NAME_AY_AN pattern (Phase-103)
hook+ring ~ kuṟi 'mark/sign'; NAME_AY_AN+GENITIVE_NAME pattern (Phase-103)
